LightningComponentBundle.description: A responsive student information card that displays student name, ID, and email with accessible design

property.name: studentName
property.label: Student Name
property.description: The name of the student to display

property.name: studentId
property.label: Student ID
property.description: The unique identifier for the student

property.name: studentEmail
property.label: Student Email
property.description: The email address of the student
